title: JUL-312 The Insensitive Married Woman Slut From Next Door Drove This Obsessive Compulsive Maso Man Insane Yuko Shiraki - Shiraki Yuko
description: The young man, Sei, who moved to the next house, has a super-mysophobia. Yuko, who was worried about her nervous husband, was worried that Sei would become an adult like her husband. "A man has to live more violently." One day, Yuko visited a room that was neatly arranged up to the remote control of Sei, and dropped the delivered cake on the floor (intentionally?). Then, when he saw the tragic floor and screamed and licked his legs with fresh cream, he trained him into a chaotic and barbaric man ...
